decisions.title_en: Mistral releases Medium 3.5 (128B dense, open-weight) with Vibe remote coding agents
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Fresh model release April 29 with 256k context, 77.6% SWE-Bench Verified, and Vibe remote agents in Le Chat. Within 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: Musk v. Altman trial Week 2: Stuart Russell + Brockman scheduled to testify Monday
decisions.reason: story_key seen in lookback (04-27, 04-28, 04-29, 04-30, 05-01). New info today (05-04): trial Week 2 begins; Stuart Russell + Greg Brockman scheduled as Musk's first witnesses on Day 5. Title and detail will focus only on this new development with brief background recap.

decisions.title_en: Chinese court rules companies cannot fire workers solely to replace them with AI
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Landmark labor ruling: QA worker Zhou's AI-replacement firing illegal, 40% pay cut deemed unreasonable, sets first major Chinese precedent against AI-driven layoffs.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft Agent 365 + M365 E7 'Frontier Suite' generally available May 1
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Major enterprise AI control plane launch: $15/user Agent 365, $99/user E7 bundle, multicloud registry sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise. Within 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: Altman publicly invites Musk to GPT-5.5 launch party May 5 in San Francisco
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Sam Altman extended public invite to Elon Musk for GPT-5.5 launch event May 5 amid ongoing trial; AI itself helped plan the party. Light/quirky news but high-profile.

decisions.title_en: Cursor releases TypeScript SDK + CLI public beta for programmatic coding agents
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-04-28 is 6 days before today (2026-05-04), exceeding the 5-day freshness limit. Despite ongoing reception coverage, the official SDK release date is April 28 per Cursor's own changelog.

decisions.title_en: Berkshire 2026 annual meeting Day 2 / Q1 earnings doubled to $10.1B
decisions.reason: Already published on 05-02 with title covering Greg Abel's debut, deepfake demo, and 'not for the sake of AI' strategy. Today's coverage is the same event with Q1 numbers ($10.1B profit doubled, $185B Apple stake at 10-yr anniversary) that fall under the same news cycle. No substantive new development.

decisions.title_en: Apple abandons net cash neutral policy, signals possible major AI acquisition
decisions.reason: Already published 04-30 covering Q1 record revenue $111.2B, $100B additional buyback, China rebound, and Cook handing off ticking time bombs (memory pricing + Gemini-Siri). The 'net cash neutral abandoned' detail was disclosed in the same earnings call covered yesterday. Speculation about an AI acquisition is commentary, not a new event.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI CFO Friar reportedly wants to delay IPO from 2026 to 2027 (WSJ profile)
decisions.reason: Already published 04-28 covering Friar's $6000亿 compute warning and joint denial. The WSJ profile published Friday is the same story with additional color (IPO 2027 vs 2026 timing, $1.4T walked back to $600B). Same root narrative, no fundamentally new event.

decisions.title_en: Yale CELI / Sonnenfeld publishes agentic-AI governance framework citing Anthropic Mythos risks
decisions.reason: Although story_key is novel and within 5-day window, content is opinion/analysis from an academic institute rather than a hard news event. Lacks concrete development, decision, or measurable impact. Quality bar not met.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic Code with Claude developer conference returns next week (SF May 6, London May 19, Tokyo June 10)
decisions.reason: Story is a soft event preview — agenda, dates, livestream info only. No new product, model, or business decision. Not a hard news item; defer until conference itself produces concrete announcements.

decisions.title_en: DeepSeek V4 release with rock-bottom pricing and Huawei chip integration
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-04-24 is 10 days old, exceeding the 5-day freshness limit. Already implicitly referenced in 04-30 huawei-12b-ai-chip-revenue-forecast story.

decisions.title_en: ChatGPT shopping experience upgrade rolling out to all users this week
decisions.reason: Within freshness window but represents incremental rollout of a feature originally announced November 2025. Light product update without concrete new capability beyond what already exists; quality bar not met.

decisions.title_en: Nvidia preparing Groq-based AI chip variant for China market, May launch expected
decisions.reason: Within freshness window but story is speculative/forward-looking — Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang publicly disputed the Reuters report as 'totally false'. No verifiable launch or product concrete enough to publish.
